expectations.evidence: Lines 20-26 define COLOR_SUCCESS, COLOR_ERROR, COLOR_WARN, COLOR_MUTED, COLOR_ACTIVE, COLOR_TITLE, COLOR_INFO. All used throughout (e.g., line 77, 238, 240).
Lines 111-114 use ›› and › for menu focus: '${TEAL}›› ${BOLD}' for selected, '${COLOR_MUTED}›' for unselected.
Lines 127-131 pre-declare W_MOUNT, W_SIZE, W_USED, W_AVAIL, W_USAGE. Lines 184-185 declare W_LABEL, W_VALUE. Used in printf with %${W_*}s format.
Lines 34-41 define trunc() function that truncates before color is applied. Used at lines 145-149, 193-195, etc.
Lines 4-5 define cleanup() with show_cur and printf RESET, trap set for EXIT INT TERM.
Lines 67-78 spin() with frames and sleep 0.12. Lines 96-102 splash bar with sleep 0.01 delays.
No --dry-run flag parsing. Has --quiet flag (line 263) but no --dry-run support.
All output lines consistently use 2-space indent: lines 44-45 section, 77, 111-114 menu, 238-240 messages all start with '  '.
Uses ✓ (lines 77, 102, 238) and ✗ (line 240) with consistent formatting like '${COLOR_SUCCESS}✓${RESET}'.
All colored output uses printf (lines 44, 72, 111, 160, 238-240). No 'echo -e' found.
draw_menu (lines 106-116) does not use numbered format. Uses visual chevron pattern instead.
